programme.title: Inocencia perdida
programme.desc: Drama

programme.title: Vanishing on I-95
programme.desc: A woman driving solo to visit a friend on Florida's I-95 mysteriously vanishes. Her divorce leads police one way, but when her body is found it suggests something horribly different. Another woman who reads about the case has a hunch she knows the killer.

programme.title: The Jersey Devil
programme.desc: 16 year-old Brittney Gregory is a star student in Brick Township, New Jersey. When she vanishes one night in 2004, local police begin a search that leads them into a world of dark secrets and dangerous players as they work to solve her disappearance.

programme.title: Driven To Murder
programme.desc: In October of 2016, after helping a friend fix his computer, 18-year-old tech prodigy, Sam Poss, takes off on foot and never returns home. Did the beloved teen run away? Was there an accident? Police work around the clock to find the truth.

programme.title: The Sheriff's Son
programme.desc: When an Arkansas outdoorsman disappears, authorities wade through a series of accusations and rumors in their hunt for the missing man. As they zero in on a suspect and the body count rises, detectives rush to capture the killer.

programme.title: Odessa
programme.desc: Mo looks for proof of Padre's secrets.

programme.title: King County
programme.desc: Morgan confronts his past.

programme.title: More Time Than You Know
programme.desc: The heroes race against time.

programme.desc: Morgan fights his past.

programme.title: Anton
programme.desc: Strand fights to protect his new life.

programme.title: Iron Tiger
programme.desc: Madison enlists an unexpected ally.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: The survivors reckon with their past.

programme.title: Keeping Her Alive
programme.desc: One survivor turns to another for help.

programme.title: Fighting Like You
programme.desc: Enemies become allies.

programme.title: The Road Ahead
programme.desc: Allies get tied up in a mission.

programme.title: Mom I'm Paquito
programme.desc: Paquito lives with his mother in poverty. When she dies he looks for his father's love, who is a very wealthy man.

programme.title: Mothers' Day
programme.desc: Tres madres lloran y comparten sus frustraciones con lágrimas de sus hijos les ocasionan; sin embargo,los hijos aprovechan la fecha del 10 de mayo, para enmendar sus errores y reconocer su amor incondicional.

programme.title: Pecado
programme.desc: Drama

programme.title: Frida
programme.desc: The most prominent female painter of Latin America, Frida Kahlo, is agonizing in her Coyoacán home. She evokes memories of her childhood, of the streetcar accident that caused her terrible pain and affliction, her friendship with Trotsky and painter Alfaro Siqueiros, her marriage to Diego Rivera, her miscarriage, her political commitment, her love affairs and the anticipated exhibition of her works.

programme.title: Dos hijos desobedientes
programme.desc: Dos hermanos luchan por comprar el rancho que alguna vez fue propiedad de su familia, pero las nuevas dueñas son dos jovencitas de las cuales se enamoran. Ahora deben aprender a controlar su comportamiento si quieren conquistarlas.

programme.title: El niño espurio
programme.desc: A comedy series about a divorced dad who likes younger women, and his son who likes older women.

programme.title: Amor de secundaria
programme.desc: A comedy series about a divorced dad who likes younger women, and his son who likes older women.

programme.title: La deportada
programme.desc: An eccentric foreign friend visits Fran's flat, but they discover she was deported from the U.S. for being a pathological liar. Chaos ensues as they confront her deceptions.

programme.title: El Garañón de oriente
programme.desc: A comedy series about a divorced dad who likes younger women, and his son who likes older women.

programme.title: Yo iba para futbolista
programme.desc: A comedy series about a divorced dad who likes younger women, and his son who likes older women.

programme.title: Los héroes del norte
programme.desc: A country music band from a small Mexican town, created by random bizarre members, strives to achieve fame and fortune.

programme.title: La tele
programme.desc: Ludovico accidentalmente destroza el televisor, cuando estaba por ver la final de fútbol, aunque Federica quería ver el final de su telenovela.

programme.title: El embarazo de Federica
programme.desc: Ludoviquito le da a su madre un licuado verde (que es en realidad un limpia cañerías), causándole ascos, lo que hace pensar a todos que Federica esta nuevamente embarazada. Y todos sueñan como sería el bebé.

programme.title: Bibi es normal
programme.desc: Federica asusta a Bibi con un sartén para hacerle un test de oído; sin embargo se desmaya y de repente ven que se "vuelve normal" (en realidad se vuelve rebelde y excéntrica, lo que para la familia es normal). Ludovico, cansado del comportamiento de su hija, y tanto Junior como Ludoviquito de que no le preste atención, deciden hacer que tenga otro accidente para que vuelva a ser la de antes. No obstante, Federica la protege mucho de Ludovico ya que le gusta que Bibi sea (lo que ella considera) normal.

programme.title: El representante de Ludoviquito
programme.desc: Un productor quiere contratar a Ludoviquito para grabar comercial y los P. Luche harán todo porque así sea. Aunque sus padres discuten por quien debe su representante.

programme.title: Vigilante
programme.desc: Don Camerino le ha dado a Ludovico un ascenso y para hacerlo, debe estar bien descansado. Sin embargo, ni los ronquidos de Federica ni una fiesta lo dejan dormir tranquilo. Entonces, Ludovico quiso dormir en la alacena, pero una gotera lo moja y fue a la azotea a cerrar las llaves de paso, pero (cree que) se queda atrapado.

programme.title: El ex
programme.desc: Exsimio, antiguo novio de Excelsa, viaja hasta México para convencerla de que regrese con él; sin embargo Ludovico descubre que es un ladrón.

programme.title: Consejos de matrimonio
programme.desc: Tras descubrirse una supuesta infidelidad de Flavio, Ludovico ayudará a su amigo a restablecer su matrimonio con Martina, quien a su vez es aconsejada por Federica.

programme.title: No estamos casados
programme.desc: A Ludovico y Federica les llega una carta diciéndoles que su matrimonio no es válido, y esto debido a que no se entiende la firma de Ludovico.

programme.title: Los candidatos
programme.desc: Silvia y Arturo compiten para ser el presidente del vecindario. Alejandra y Rocko se preocupan porque creen que han perdido su juventud y personalidad.

programme.title: Hoy juega México
programme.desc: La tía Oli visita a su sobrina Silvita y no se irá hasta conseguirle pareja. Germán organiza una reunión para ver fútbol, pero todos escapan cuando les pide cooperación. Silvita intenta imitar a su tía, mientras en su casa se arma un caos.

programme.title: Reunión de ex alumnos
programme.desc: Silvia organiza una reunión en su departamento para sus excompañeros, por lo que le pide a Pedro que se haga pasar por su novio para que no piensen que sigue soltera.

programme.title: Jorjáis roomie
programme.desc: Magdalena sospecha de que Lorena tiene un amante y convence a Silvia de seguirla para descubrir la verdad. Pedro le renta a Jorjáis la habitación de Luis para que tenga donde dormir, sin imaginar las consecuencias.

programme.title: Amador y Vinicio deberán huir
programme.desc: Nazario acusa a Amador de matar a Trini. Sara quiere hacer una autopsia. Alonso cita a Amador en su casa y le dice lo q Nazario piensa. Marcelo sospecha q Rebeca mato a Trini. Amador prohíbe a su fam q asista al entierro.

programme.title: Regalo perfecto
programme.desc: Luisito le da un regalo a Silvita por su cumpleanos, pero ella no lo esperaba. En tanto que, Calaco decide visitar a Rocco en su casa.

programme.title: Tendedero
programme.desc: Magdalena decides to put a clothesline in the middle of the corridors of the building and Luis will look for a way to remove it.

programme.title: Amigos
programme.desc: Silvia agrega a Luis al chat de la guardería y Germán recibe la visita de sus amigos comentaristas de TUDN que transmiten un partido desde la conserjería.

programme.title: Auto nuevo
programme.desc: Luis le compra un auto nuevo a Silvia para que pasee con Luisito Jr. y Morris le tiene una mala noticia a sus padres: no le gusta el rock.

programme.title: Tacos veganos
programme.desc: Virginia y Borre terminan su relacion y no conforme, ella decide iniciar su propio negocio de tacos veganos. Arturo se encuentra un billete de mil pesos.

programme.title: Ropa de paca
programme.desc: Jorjáis decide invertir en un negocio de ropa de paca y descubre que no está solo, tiene competencia. Silvia y Luis buscan sobrevivir al primer día de guardería de Luisito Jr.

programme.title: Silvia party loving
programme.desc: Karla, la sobrina de Silvia, la visita en su casa, y ella finge que tiene una actitud muy cool y se va de parranda con ella. Pedro se siente mal y no puede salir de su cuarto.

programme.title: Nano por un día
programme.desc: La guardería está cerrada y Silvia y Luis no tienen quién cuide a Luisito Jr., por lo que tendrán que elegir entre los vecinos. Hipólito, Pedro y Germán buscan hacer válida la garantía de un celular.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: In a neighborhood in Mexico City, the neighbors have problems and silly misadventures with one another.

programme.title: El grupo de whats
programme.desc: Germán convoca a una junta vecinal, pero nadie asiste porque nadie vio el anuncio en el pizarrón, Jorjais les propone hacer un grupo de chat para enterarse de los acontecimientos en el edificio.

programme.title: El gas
programme.desc: Como es costumbre en el edificio, los vecinos no pagan la cuota del gas, y ante la negativa de todos, Luis decide poner su propio tanque estacionario ¡en la azotea!

programme.title: Franeleros
programme.desc: Luis estaciona su carro afuera de su edificio y un franelero quiere cobrarle 20 pesos por cuidar su coche. Los vecinos hacen una junta para planear quitarlos sin que haya consecuencias.

programme.title: El reciclaje
programme.desc: Los vecinos reciben una invitación de la delegación para separar la basura. Algo muy básico: orgánica e inorgánica, Germán es el encargado de dicha misión.

programme.title: La fiesta de Morris
programme.desc: Magdalena abre una cuenta en Facebook donde presume demasiadas cosas e inclusive transmite en vivo una invitación pública para la fiesta de su nieto Morris.

programme.title: La chica del feis
programme.desc: Pedro se dedica a buscar mujeres por Facebook, y ante el asombro de Luis, conoce a una chica guapísima; Luis tiene curiosidad y decide aplicar la misma técnica para encontrar al amor de su vida.

programme.title: Como en casa
programme.desc: Silvia, desesperada por conocer hombres, renta una habitación de su departamento por medio de una aplicación; un hombre apuesto renta el cuarto, ella se enamora, pero aparece la ex novia y comienzan los problemas.

programme.title: El simulacro
programme.desc: Un temblor llega a la ciudad sacudiendo todos los departamentos de los vecinos. Luis les propone a los vecinos llevar a una persona de Protección civil para prepararlos ante una emergencia.

programme.title: Sacrificios
programme.desc: Romance, Drama

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

programme.title: MeatEater - Cooking Special: Giving Thanks
programme.desc: The Pilgrims didn't get their turkey at the store and neither does Steven Rinella. On this special Holiday episode Steve cooks three enticing dishes: Wild Turkey Galantine, Smoked Black Bear Ham, and his take on the traditional Mincemeat Pie. Appetites will run large as Steve makes a special meal for his family and friends.

programme.title: MeatEater - True North: Alaska North Slope Caribou
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and special guest, the author Tim Ferriss, travel to the remote north slope of Alaska.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Greatest Draw: Alaska Dall Sheep Part 1
programme.desc: After drawing one of the most coveted big game tags in North America, a Tok Management Area Dall sheep tag, Steven Rinella heads out for a truly rare and epic Alaskan experience. Along with his brother Danny and friend Paul, Steve is dropped deep into the Alaska Range. After a rugged hike through nasty weather, Steve's skills and fortitude are tested against his elusive, high-climbing quarry.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Greatest Draw: Alaska Dall Sheep Part 2
programme.desc: After drawing one of the most coveted big game tags in North America a Tok Management Area Dall sheep tag Steven Rinella heads out for a truly rare and epic Alaskan experience. Along with his brother Danny and friend Paul, Steve is dropped deep into the Alaska Range. After a rugged hike through nasty weather, Steve's skills and fortitude are tested against his elusive, high-climbing quarry.

programme.title: MeatEater - Sonoran Super-Birds: Mexico Gould's Turkey
programme.desc: Steven Rinella crosses the border into Mexico's desert to call in the Gould's wild turkey. Of the five turkey subspecies in North America, the Gould's is the largest but rarest. On this unique Mexican adventure, Steve finds exciting action for gobbling toms. With locally made charcoal at his disposal, he'll grill up a big, brined, delicious bird.

programme.title: MeatEater - Straight Flush: Montana Mountain Grouse
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and his friend Ronny Boehme drive into the mountains of southwest Montana to hunt the high ridge tops for dusky grouse. Ronny's Bracco Italiano hunting dogs have been bred and trained for this work, but can Ronny handle the altitude? The duo prepares dusky grouse jalape√±o poppers and grouse fettuccine with a white wine and cream sauce.

programme.title: MeatEater - Meet the Meateaters: Montana Crew Muley Part 1
programme.desc: The goal on MeatEater has always been to make viewers feel like they're on a hunt with Steven Rinella, but on this two-part episode Rinella grants his viewers an all-access pass to see just how the MeatEater crew works together to make the show. Strap-in for some behind-the-scenes action.

programme.title: MeatEater - Meet the Meateaters: Montana Crew Muley Part 2
programme.desc: The goal on MeatEater has always been to make viewers feel like theyre on a hunt with Steven Rinella, but.

programme.title: MeatEater - First Timers: Montana Mule Deer Part 1
programme.desc: Television personality Joe Rogan and his best friend, comedian Bryan Callen, join Steven Rinella for their very first hunt. On a float trip for mule deer through the rugged Missouri Breaks, this is as adventurous of a first hunt as anyone could hope for, and Steve's special guests are in for a memorable experience and delicious wild game field cooking in some gorgeous country.

programme.title: MeatEater - First Timers: Montana Mule Deer Part 2
programme.desc: Television personality Joe Rogan and his best friend, comedian Bryan Callen, join Steven Rinella for their very first hunt. On a float trip for mule deer through the rugged Missouri Breaks, this is as adventurous of a first hunt as anyone could hope for, and Steve's special guests are in for a memorable experience and delicious wild game field cooking in some gorgeous country.

programme.title: MeatEater - Swamp Stew: Michigan Bowfishing
programme.desc: Steven Rinella returns to his cherished boyhood stomping grounds along Michigans Muskegon River.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Wide Open: New Mexico Antelope
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and friend Cody Lujan head to Northeastern New Mexico to hunt pronghorn antelope, the fastest big game animal in the United States. In the wide open desert plains, Steve will have to work hard to stalk within range of a mature buck. The payoff will be antelope loin topped with local New Mexico chiles.

programme.title: MeatEater - Primal Cuts: Bone-in Cooking Special
programme.desc: In this cooking special, Steven Rinella shows his fans some of his favorite preparations for big, bone-in cuts of red meat. Interspersed with highlights from his recent caribou, buffalo, and mule deer hunts, the show features recipes that utilize some of the most underappreciated parts of big game animals. This episode is an attractive and delicious tribute to Steve's gun-to-table ethic.

programme.title: MeatEater - El Venado Blanco: Mexico Coues Deer
programme.desc: Steven Rinella returns to his favorite hunting grounds of Sonora, Mexico to hunt for a Coues deer buck during the peak rutting season. Steve sets up camp and spends days glassing mountains and canyons for these elusive, wary desert whitetails. Meanwhile, his hunting partner, Remi Warren, attempts the difficult task of stalking one with a bow. To cap off the hunt, Steve cooks a batch of venison ribs braised in a Dutch oven buried beneath hot coals.

programme.title: MeatEater - Clash of the Titans: Northern California Pig & Deer
programme.desc: In this episode, Steven Rinella joins forces with fellow hunter and wild game chef Hank Shaw in the hills of Central California to go after Columbia blacktail deer, wild pigs, and a handful of small game species that are in season. The end result is a culinary smorgasbord of epic proportions.

programme.title: MeatEater - Sea Bear: Alaska Spring Bear and Seafood
programme.desc: Steve ventures out to his hunting and fishing shack on a remote coastline of southeast Alaska's Prince of Wales Island. While hunting bears from a skiff and a canoe, Steve gathers a variety of prime seafood and makes a discovery about his own motivations as a bear hunter.

programme.title: MeatEater - Full Boar: Whole Hog Cooking Special
programme.desc: Steven Rinella breaks down an entire boar and shares some of his favorite recipes in this Cooking Special. Matt Weingarter helps steve make head cheese, pork skin cracklins, smoked pork butt, and a tied-roast boned-out ham. Each dish requires thoughtful butchering, processing, and cooking to execute to perfection.

programme.title: MeatEater - Bull by Boat: British Columbia Moose
programme.desc: Steve and his buddy Ryan Callaghan float a remote river on a bull moose hunt.

programme.title: MeatEater - Local Motion: Montana Bull Elk
programme.desc: Steve must deal with bad weather and fierce competition during a late-season central Montana elk hunt.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Northern Rockies: British Columbia Grizzly Part 1
programme.desc: Steve and his buddy Ryan Callaghan, a British Columbia guide, hike into the steep backcountry of northern British Columbia in search of grizzlies and black bears. Among the beutiful alpine vista, this adventure includes some intense and up-close bear action ‚Äì almost too close.

programme.title: The Price of Winning
programme.desc: The 1987 Edmonton Oilers entered the Stanley Cup Finals as the greatest hockey team ever, boasting 7 future Hall of Famers and two Stanley Cups under their belt. programme.title: Next Year
programme.desc: It had been 108 years since the Chicago Cubs had last won the World Series. And now, after trailing 3-1 in the series, the Cubs were one game away from ending the drought. programme.title: Archie Eats And Runs
programme.desc: Archie comes home for a nice dinner that Edith has prepared: beef and mushroom stew.

programme.title: Gloria Sings The Blues
programme.desc: Gloria comes home from work one evening in a total apathetic mood.

programme.title: Mike's Graduation
programme.desc: Mike's graduation day is coming up fast and Mike is a nervous wreck as he studies for his exams.

programme.title: Pay The Twenty Dollars
programme.desc: Archie stops by Jefferson Cleaners to pick up some dry cleaning and pays with a twenty dollar bill. Later, a furious George shows up at the Bunker's front door claiming the bill Archie passed to him was counterfeit. This leads to two separate arguments: one between Archie and George and the other between Edith and Louise. Louise and Edith quickly make up and soon put a plan into motion that would clear up the entire mess between George and Archie.

programme.title: Where's Archie (Part I)
programme.desc: Mike and Gloria worry about Archie's sudden disappearance while on his way to a union convention in Buffalo. Not wanting to upset Edith, they keep this from her who is busy putting together her first Tupperware party and struggles with a short speech that she plans to give.

programme.title: Archie Is Missing (Part II)
programme.desc: After discovering that Archie is missing, Edith goes down to the police station with Mike to file a missing persons report. Later, while going through some of Archie's things, Mike discovers a photo of Archie with another woman. This leads him to believe that Archie may have run off with another woman.

programme.title: The Longest Kiss (Part III)
programme.desc: Edith has news that Archie finally called home to let everyone know where he was. Supposedly he got sidetracked to a podiatrists' convention in Rochester. Meanwhile, Mike and Gloria get into a big fight about lying which results in a kissing contest, just in time for a welcome home party.

programme.title: The Bunkers And Inflation (Part II)
programme.desc: With Archie out on strike, household funds have begun to dwindle, leaving Edith in a touch position trying to balance the little household income that is coming in. Meanwhile, tempers flare as Archie finds himself with nothing to do but sit around the house.

programme.title: The Bunkers And Inflation (Part III)
programme.desc: With Archie still on strike and the household income dwindling, Edith decides to go out and try to get a job. Louise comes to her rescue offering her a job working in one of George's cleaning stores. However, when Archie hears of this he refuses to take charity and tries to get Edith to turn the offer down.

programme.title: The Bunkers And Inflation (Part IV)
programme.desc: Archie begins to feel like the odd man out, with everyone working in the family except him. Meanwhile, negotiations continue with Archie's union but an agreement is finally made leaving Archie with a raise. However, Archie doesn't realize that the results of the negotiations will leave him worse off than before the strike began.

programme.title: Mike's Friend
programme.desc: One of Mike's graduate school friends, Stuart, comes over one evening for a visit and Gloria begins to feel like an intellectual outcast. This leads her to believe that perhaps as Mike becomes more educated in school, he may start looking for a smarter woman.

programme.title: Lionel, The Live-In
programme.desc: Archie and Edith are kept up all night with the sounds of an argument coming from the Jeffersons home. This soon leads to Lionel temporarily moving in with the Bunkers after George refuses to allow his son to marry a girl who has a white father. Archie soon gets fed up and tries to get Lionel and George to make peace.

programme.desc: Two tanks of radioactive gas are stolen; and the tire track of a 1930's automobile is the Angels' only clue. Since there is an antique auto rally being held nearby, it makes sense to go there and see if anybody looks suspicious.

programme.title: Angels Come Home
programme.desc: At the Grand Prix, the Angels investigate an explosion in a garage. A man named Paul Ferrino tries to murder his old girlfriend Jill by having her drive an experimental car rigged with a bomb.

programme.title: The Sandcastle Murders
programme.desc: Sabrina, Kelly and Kris stalk the sands of Malibu Beach to track down the surfside killer of several young women in "Sandcastles Murders." Police have virtually no leads in their investigation of the "Sandcastle Murders." When one of the victims turns out to be a personal friend of Kris, boss Charlie give the girls permission to handle their own investigation. Kate Jackson, Jaclyn Smith and Cheryl Ladd star as the Angels, Sabrina Duncan, Kelly Garrett and Kris Munroe, respectively, who work for Charlie, an unseen and very sophisticated boss who phones in their instructions. David Doyle stars as Bosley, Charlie's harried assistant.

programme.title: Angel Blues
programme.desc: Stunned by the mysterious death of his favorite folk-rock singer, Charlie sends Kelly, Kris and Sabrina to find everyone who spent time with the victim the night she pied in "Angel Blues." Amy Waters is one of the most popular singers in the country. Shortly after freaking out during a concert performance, Amy calls her dad to say she's coming home by cab to "get straight." But Amy makes a few stops along the way. One of the last people to see her alive is Lenny, the taxi driver Kris becomes acquainted with during the investigation. Kate Jackson, Jaclyn Smith and Cheryl Ladd star as the Angels, Sabrina Duncan, Kelly Garrett and Kris Munroe, respectively, who work for Charlie, an unseen and very sophisticated boss who phones in their instructions. David Doyle stars as Bosley, Charlie's harried assistant.

programme.title: Angels In Vegas (Part I)
programme.desc: Dean Martin, as casino boss Frank Howell, is unnerved by the violent deaths of his closest friends.

programme.title: Angels In Vegas (Part II)
programme.desc: Dean Martin, as casino boss Frank Howell, is unnerved by the violent deaths of his closest friends.

programme.title: Angel On High
programme.desc: Wheelchair-bound Jonathan Stambler, an inveterate newspaper reader, learns that Joan Freeman has died in rural Caine's Corners. Her newspaper photo bears an uncanny resemblance to his old love Joan Cabelli; her son William could be Stambler's own son and the heir to a substantial fortune. Bosley and the Angels find Joan's house stripped of evidential materials, and a courthouse fire destroys important documents. A gunshot kills visitor Edward Markle, who proves to be an underworld connection of Joan's late father Louis Cabelli. Bosley and Angels travel to the Reno Air Show, and are joined by Stambler and his dedicated nurse Evelyn. Romance blooms between Kelly and stunt flyer Bill Freeman. Thugs Harmon and Fenton abduct Kris, Kelly and Freeman. but Bosley and Sabrina thwart their plans. Evelyn, fearful of losing Stambler's affection and money, had arranged for Freeman's death. Bill, a free spirit, flies away without meeting the man who may be his father. Kate Jackson, Jaclyn Smith and Cheryl Ladd star as the Angels, Sabrina Duncan, Kelly Garrett and Kris Munroe, respectively, who work for Charlie, an unseen and very sophisticated boss who phones in their instructions. David Doyle stars as Bosley, Charlie's harried assistant. PRODUCTION CREDITS Executive Producers: Aaron Spelling and Leonard Goldberg Producer: Edward J. Lakso Director: Larry Doheny Writer: Edward J. Lakso

programme.title: Angels In Springtime
programme.desc: Famous actress Eve Le Deus is electrocuted in her hydro-massage tank at the exclusive Springtime Women's Spa. Eve's niece, Eve Perkins (a librarian) hires Bosley and the Angels to find the murderer and a missing manuscript in her aunt's possession at the time. Charlie once appeared in a one-act play with Le Deux and for that reason accepts the assignment. Sabrina (posing as a dietician) and Kris (as an exercise instructor) approach Ingrid Nyberg -- the Spa's cold and imposing Manager. The girls also meet Norms Powers, a very energetic older woman who claims to have been Le Deux's close friend. Zora, a muscular masseuse, questions (and bullies) Kris in the exercise room.Kelly arrives at the Spa, posing as a patron. She is examined by Dr. Slavin, a suspicious-looking woman who tries to hypnotize her. Zora locks Kris in the steam room but Sabrina and Kelly arrive in time to save her Bosley arrives (posing as an electrician) and the lights mysteriously go out. Just as Charlie's Angels think they have the murderers in tow, a twist occurs and the Spa's convalescent turns out to be the culprit. They move in for the arrest and she gets up from her wheelchair and miraculously runs! Kate Jackson, Jaclyn Smith and Cheryl Ladd star as the Angels, Sabrina Duncan, Kelly Garrett and Kris Munroe, respectively, who work for Charlie, an unseen and very sophisticated boss who phones in their instructions. David Doyle stars as Bosley, Charlie's harried assistant.PRODUCTION CREDITSExecutive Producers: Aaron Spelling and Leonard GoldbergProducers: Ronald Austin and James D. Buchanan Director: Larry Stewart

programme.title: Lisa's Jam Session
programme.desc: Oliver finds himself in a jam after asking Lisa to make him homemade fruit preserves. An episode deliciously devoted to Lisa's culinary escapades, Lisa musters all of her Hungarian might to make Oliver the best peach jam he's ever tasted.

programme.title: Oliver Vs The Phone Company
programme.desc: After years of substandard service, Oliver is hellbent on throwing the book at the Hooterville Phone Company. When it becomes clear that the local utility oversight board can't do much about it, he decides to handle matters directly.

programme.title: Oliver Takes Over The Phone Company
programme.desc: Mr. Trendell, the president of the Hooterville Phone Company, hands the company over to a delighted Oliver. But after a day of crossed wires and a switchboard repairman with some lose connections of his own, Oliver is ready to call it quits.

programme.title: Don't Count Your Tomatoes Before They're Picked
programme.desc: For the first time, Oliver has a successful crop that needs picking. His tomatoes have grown beautifully. But matters at the phone company continue divide his precious time, so Oliver looks for an interested buyer to take the company off his hands.

programme.title: A Kind Word For The President
programme.desc: Being president of the Hooterville Phone Company has been a rude awakening for Oliver. The switchboard operator is now calling him at five in the morning! After a bevy of new complaints from unhappy customers, Oliver has just about had enough.

programme.title: Eb Elopes
programme.desc: One might think that when Eb takes a vacation things around the farm might go more smoothly. But when Eb elopes, leaving his cousin Walter to take his place, it turns out to be a horrible idea. Walter barely knows a weed from a hole in the ground!

programme.title: The Thing
programme.desc: Lisa is reminded that she stored a birthday present for Oliver years ago: a genuine Stavinsky. But what is it? It's a modern art sculpture that is two parts plumbing pipes, one part tire chains, and one part birdbath. Oliver calls it "The Thing."

programme.title: Das Lumpen
programme.desc: The continually evolving story of how Lisa (Eva Gabor) and Oliver (Oliver) fell in love gets yet another version in this delightful episode. But one thing is for sure: Lisa and Oliver are just as in love today as the day when he fell out of the sky.

programme.title: Jealousy, English Style
programme.desc: Green Acres is greener than ever, with jealousy. When Oliver (Eddie Albert) hires a handsome, young, intelligent Brit to take over his farm work while he is away, it doesn't take long for the newcomer to make a strong impression on Lisa (Eva Gabor).

programme.title: Haney's New Image
programme.desc: Mr. Haney is up to his money-making schemes again. When a government representative tells Mr. Haney that the state is looking to purchase the Douglas farm for a new highway, Mr. Haney arranges to buy back the farm from the Douglases at a steal.

programme.title: Alf And Ralph Break Up
programme.desc: Ralph, the lady carpenter, runs away from home and stays with the Douglases after having a fight with her brother, Alf. While Oliver may never get his bedroom finished, he gains a maid as Ralph takes over as the Douglases' live-in housekeeper.

programme.title: No Trespassing
programme.desc: Picking apples while on a picnic, Oliver runs into the feisty Ira Hatch, the owner of the apple orchard. However, once back in town, Mr. Drucker tells Oliver that Hatch has been dead for years. An incredulous Oliver agrees to see a psychologist.

programme.title: Eb Returns
programme.desc: After his elopement and cross-country honeymoon, Eb returns to Hooterville. But his new wife is nowhere to be found! After sending postcards from all across the country, Eb has to confess that his fianc� stood him up at the alter on their big day.

programme.title: Not Guilty
programme.desc: Someone has stolen $300 from Mr. Drucker's general store, and it looks like Eb is the culprit. How else could he have bought himself a new car that cost, you guessed it, exactly $300? But that is just the first twist of the many turns of this story.

programme.title: How To Succeed In TV Without Really Trying
programme.desc: Lisa awakes, saying she's dreamt that she must invest in copper. When Oliver turns that idea down, she seizes on the opportunity to invest in a ten-year-old genius's electric company. Twenty-eight dollars buys her a third of the business.

programme.title: Arnold, Boy Hero
programme.desc: Arnold, the Ziffels' television-loving pig, has taken on a paper route to save enough money for a new color set. But when bank robbers show up and threaten his dreams, and Lisa and Oliver are held captive in their own home, Arnold has to fight back.

programme.title: Flight To Nowhere
programme.desc: The farmers of Hooterville are headed to France! Or at least they are if they can get organized. As part of an agricultural exchange program, the farmers are offered a chance to join a chartered government flight to Europe.

programme.title: My Mother The Countess
programme.desc: Lisa (Eva Gabor) is delighted to learn that her Hungarian mother is planning a visit to their little farm. Much to Oliver's (Eddie Albert) disbelief and dismay, a rumor spreads all around Hooterville that Lisa's mother is a European countess.

programme.title: The Addams Family Meets The Undercover Man
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: Mother Lurch Visits The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: Uncle Fester's Illness
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she an Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family Splurges
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: Cousin Itt Visits The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family In Court
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: Amnesia In The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: Thing Is Missing
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: Crisis In The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: Lurch And His Harpsicord
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: Morticia, The Breadwinner
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family And The Spaceman
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: My Son, The Chimp
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: Morticia's Favorite Charity
programme.desc: Moriticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: Progress And The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: Uncle Fester's Toupee
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: Cousin Itt And The Vocational Counselor
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: Movie The Perfect Mate

On the day they're scheduled to leave she's dumped by her fiancé. That's when she enlists the help of her platonic male friend, Jesse (Chico Benymon), who is the epitome of everything ungodly, to impersonate her ex, the upcoming pastor. While there, he learns to appreciate family and faith in this hilarious Christian Romance Comedy.

programme.title: This Might Be My God Moment
programme.desc: Are you standing over a situation that's too big for you? If you feel like your hope, logic, and options are at a dead end, pay attention because this might be your God moment.

programme.title: All Those Times You Didnt See
programme.desc: The efforts you make when no one's watching are the ones God uses to shape you. Just because you don't see the outcome yet doesn't mean He's ignoring you; He's positioning you. Keep showing up while you wait.

programme.title: All You've Got To Do Is Don't
programme.desc: We all find ourselves in seasons when we feel like we don't have what it takes, and we don't know what to do. But don't be afraid or discouraged, because God isn't late - He's working according to His timing. Don't lose hope, and don't give up.

programme.title: The God Of Pieces
programme.desc: The devil wants to keep you overwhelmed by your situation, but God wants to show you how to deal with it piece by piece. And as you learn to praise God for the piece you have, you'll experience the peace you've been praying for.

programme.title: I Thought It Was Through
programme.desc: When despair sets in, it's easy to assume it'll always be this way. But what if a shift in thinking could break that cycle? Your thoughts have the power to disrupt your despair.

programme.title: When God Gives A Thought To You
programme.desc: We live in a world that values things more than thoughts, so when God speaks to us, we don't always value it like we should. In this message, learn some of the ways God speaks, when to ask for it, and how to recognize it when He does.

programme.title: The Hardest Part Is Behind You
programme.desc: Don't judge any one part of your life in isolation or let unmet expectations define your future. God's not finished with your story, and He didn't bring you this far to let you turn back now.

programme.title: Elevation Church Live
programme.desc: Welcome to Elevation Church. See what God can do through you.

programme.title: Not As Long As My Song!
programme.desc: Hitting your limit isn't a sign of weakness; it's an invitation to shift your perspective. When the enemy brings the battle to your mind, remember that he only attacks what's valuable. And God's goodness is your secret weapon to win the fight.

programme.title: Hand Him The Plan
programme.desc: Sometimes the battle in your mind is proof that God's trying to do something great in your heart. What you see isn't the full picture of what God has for you. When you hand God your plans, you make room for His purpose.

programme.title: Living with Confidence & Going All In
programme.desc: Expect to learn why Matthew says life often “rhymes”, why it’s okay if you do everything right and still not get the result you want, how Matthew views the role courage plays in his life, how to learn to deal with failure, the difference between a nice guy and a good man, the most important principle Matthew refuses to compromise on, the appropriate balance of running toward a life you want vs. away from one that you fear, how to balance self-confidence with humility, the difference between “being” and “acting”, what it means to be more impressed with the wow instead of the how, rumors on Matthew’s return to the True Detective franchise, and much more…

programme.title: How To Find Direction When Nothing Feels Right
programme.desc: From 6× Mr. Olympia to full-time business owner and stay-at-home dad, it’s safe to say Chris Bumstead’s been enjoying retired life. So what’s he been up to this past year, what’s changed most for him, and what’s he looking forward to next? Expect to learn how retirement is going for Cbum, if Cbum would have retired last year even if he didn’t win, how Chris learned to sit and process his emotions, if Cbum regrets retirement and if he misses the competing yet, how Chris plans on leveling up for baby Bumstead number two, he hardest part of losing that “Mr. Olympia structure” in daily life, if Chris ever plans on returning the stage again, and much more…

programme.title: Comforting Truths About Human Nature
programme.desc: How can we truly understand ourselves? Most of us either ignore our emotions or overthink them, turning simple feelings into complex puzzles. So how do we navigate the minefield of emotion to grow and become better? Expect to learn where self-esteem really comes from, why criticism hurts so much, where imposter syndrome comes from and how to overcome it, if hustle culture is a modern phenomenon or is this something new, why we tend to intellectualise our emotions, why we have existential crisis’ and how to navigate them, why online dating is so miserable for so many people and much more…

programme.title: How to Treat Men Better
programme.desc: Are modern gender dynamics leaving men feeling ‘castrated’? While men are often blamed for today’s social problems, far less attention is given to how shifting expectations of women and relationships may also shape male identity. What role do women play in this dynamic—and how can it be improved? Expect to learn how important it is for women to seem impressed or giddy or appreciative of their partner, how women can appear more receptive or appreciative, why men are being emasculated by women, how women can stop castrating men and much more…
